About Us

Context is everything.

At Gestalt, we believe art is meant to be understood, not just observed. We are building the intelligence interface for the world's great collections, connecting physical galleries with infinite digital knowledge.

Our Mission

We are a team of AI researchers, designers, and art historians dedicated to removing the friction between curiosity and understanding. By leveraging state-of-the-art computer vision and generative AI like Gemini, we allow museums to offer instantly accessible, deeply contextual, and multi-lingual narratives—with no apps to download and minimal hardware required.

The Vision

A world where every physical object can instantly share its origins, meaning, and significance in the blink of an eye. The ultimate augmented reality for human curiosity.
